testcase.name: test_get_cashier_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sales_leaderboard_iter138.py:232: in test_get_cashier_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get user failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get user failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
